word_list.word: the wages of sin is death
word_list.pronunciation: 冒蓹 w藞e瑟d蕭岬粃 蕦v s藞瑟n 瑟z d藞蓻胃

senses.definition: used to imply that engaging in immoral or sinful behavior leads to negative consequences, which may be fatal or result in spiritual death or separation from God

word_list.word: begin to weave and God will give the thread
word_list.pronunciation: b瑟伞藞瑟n t蓹 w藞i藧v 忙nd 伞藞蓱藧d w瑟l 伞藞瑟v 冒蓹 胃晒藞蓻d

senses.definition: used to suggest that taking action and starting a project or pursuing a goal is the most important step, and that the necessary resources and support will come as one goes along

examples.x: When overwhelmed with coding, my mentor advised me to start writing basic programs even if they were imperfect, saying 'begin to weave and God will give the thread.'

word_list.word: the danger past, and God forgotten
word_list.pronunciation: 冒蓹 d藞e瑟nd蕭蓺 p藞忙st 忙nd 伞藞蓱藧d f蓺伞藞蓱藧蕯n泰

senses.definition: used to criticize people who only seek divine help during times of crisis but do not maintain a consistent practice of faith or spirituality

word_list.pronunciation: f藞e瑟胃 k忙n w瑟l m藞u藧v m藞a蕣nt瑟nz

senses.definition: used to emphasize the power of strong faith and belief in oneself, as it can overcome seemingly impossible challenges and enable individuals to accomplish difficult tasks

examples.x: As a cancer survivor, I know firsthand how faith can move mountains.

word_list.word: family that prays together stays together
word_list.pronunciation: f藞忙m瑟li 冒忙t p晒藞e瑟z t蓹伞藢蓻冒蓺 st藞e瑟z t蓹伞藞蓻冒蓺

senses.definition: used to suggest that shared faith and spirituality can strengthen family bonds and promote a sense of togetherness and support

examples.x: As a parent, I believe that 'family that prays together stays together' is an important lesson to teach our children.

word_list.word: the fear of the Lord is the beginning of knowledge, but fools despise wisdom and instruction
word_list.pronunciation: 冒蓹 f藞瑟晒 蕦v冒蓹 l藞蓴藧晒d 瑟z 冒蓹 b瑟伞藞瑟n瑟艐 蕦v n藞蓱藧l瑟d蕭 b藢蕦t f藞u藧lz d瑟sp藞a瑟z w藞瑟sd蓹m 忙nd 瑟nst晒藞蕦k蕛蓹n

senses.definition: used to imply that being open to instruction and willing to learn leads to gaining knowledge and understanding, while rejecting wisdom and being closed-minded is foolish and hinders growth

word_list.word: [put] your trust in god, and keep your powder dry
word_list.pronunciation: p藢蕣t j蕣晒 t晒藞蕦st 瑟n 伞藞蓱藧d 忙nd k藞i藧p j蕣晒 p藞a蕣d蓺 d晒藞a瑟

senses.definition: used to highlight the importance of balance between relying on higher powers and taking responsible action

word_list.word: there but for the grace of God go I
word_list.pronunciation: 冒蓻晒 b藢蕦t f蓺冒蓹 伞晒藞e瑟s 蕦v 伞藞蓱藧d 伞藢o蕣 藞a瑟

senses.definition: used to express a sense of humility and gratitude, acknowledging that one's circumstances could have been different if not for the benevolence or favor of a higher power

word_list.pronunciation: 冒藞a蕣 蕛藢忙lt n藢蓱藧t k藞瑟l

senses.definition: used to promote the value of human life and the importance of non-violence

examples.x: When it comes to making ethical decisions in my personal and professional life, I often think back to the commandment 'thou shalt not kill.'

word_list.word: whom the gods love, (shall|must|) die young
word_list.pronunciation: h藞u藧m 冒蓹 伞藞蓱藧dz l藞蕦v 蕛藢忙l 蓴藧晒 m藞蕦st 蓴藧晒 d藞a瑟 j藞蕦艐

senses.definition: used to suggest that individuals who are highly favored or blessed by the gods are often taken away from the world at a young age

word_list.word: God tempers the wind to the shorn lamb
word_list.pronunciation: 伞藞蓱藧d t藞蓻mp蓺z 冒蓹 w藞瑟nd t蓹 冒蓹 蕛藞蓴藧晒n l藞忙m

senses.definition: used to suggest that even in difficult circumstances, those who are vulnerable or disadvantaged will be provided with the necessary strength and protection to overcome adversity

examples.x: He had just lost his job and thought of the saying 'God tempers the wind to the shorn lamb,' feeling that it was a reminder of God's care and protection during difficult times.

word_list.word: all is for the best in the best of all possible worlds
word_list.pronunciation: 藞蓴藧l 瑟z f蓺冒蓹 b藞蓻st 瑟n冒蓹 b藞蓻st 蕦v 藞蓴藧l p藞蓱藧s蓹b蓹l w藞蓽藧ldz

senses.definition: used to imply that everything happens for a good reason and the world is as good as it can be, emphasizing the idea of optimism and the belief that everything works out for the best

examples.x: Despite the challenges she faced, Sarah remained optimistic, believing that "all is for the best in the best of all possible worlds.

word_list.word: confession is good for the soul
word_list.pronunciation: k蓹nf藞蓻蕛蓹n 瑟z 伞藞蕣d f蓺冒蓹 s藞o蕣l

senses.definition: used for saying that admitting one's mistakes, sins, or wrongdoings can bring spiritual and emotional healing and relief

examples.x: The therapist told her patient that it was important to confess their mistakes and take responsibility for their actions because confession is good for the soul and can bring about personal growth.
